assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Correctly identifies Service A as HIGH RISK and states it will block all node drains, preventing any pod disruption

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Correctly identifies Service B as HIGH RISK and states it will block all node drains, preventing ANY pod eviction

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Incorrectly labels Service C as MEDIUM RISK rather than safe, citing concerns about competition with rolling deployments and unhealthy replicas

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Correctly identifies Service D as LOW RISK/SAFE and states it's a good configuration that allows controlled disruption

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command to change Service A to minAvailable=80% and suggests maxUnavailable=20% alternative

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch command to change Service B to maxUnavailable=20% and removes minAvailable constraint

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during node drains' and 'After 1 hour, GKE may force-drain nodes regardless of PDBs'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl patch commands for both Service A and Service B with exact syntax and parameters

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Does not mention testing in non-production environments before making PDB changes
